/usr/sbin/g++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.11 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/milo/projects/go-llama.cpp/build/bin: -ldl ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.11 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.11
